examples.text: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍۢ مُّنِيبٍ
examples.english: who were in awe of the Most Compassionate without seeing ˹Him˺,1 and have come with a heart turning ˹only to Him˺.

senses.gloss: a person giving authority to another

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of the verb أَنَابَ (ʔanāba, “to delegate”).
